ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of driving an auto-rickshaw.  The driver's arms would be actively involved in steering and controlling the vehicle. We'll focus on the motion of the arms, mimicking the turning of the steering wheel and the overall posture of a driver. The animation will be asymmetric, focusing primarily on the right arm's movement, since the driver would primarily control the vehicle's direction with that hand. Frame 1 will show both arms relaxed, Frame 2 will show the right arm extended and turned slightly, Frame 3 will show the right arm pulling back, and Frame 4 will show the right arm returning to a neutral position. The left arm remains mostly static, providing a contrast to the right arm's movement. I will keep in mind the robot's two-joint system and use small wrist twists for more realism.

frames.beat: both arms rest, ready to drive
right arm extends, turning the wheel right
right arm pulls back, completing the turn
arms return to neutral, steady driving steady
